raw_consumer_statement:
Dear Consumer Financial Protection Bureau, I am writing to file a complaint regarding Citibank and their handling of an insurance payment related to my XXXX  credit card account. 

Incident Description : On XX/XX/XXXX, I was involved in a motorcycle incident, resulting in my bike being totaled. My XXXX insurance issued a check for the amount of {$5200.00} USD on XX/XX/XXXX, to cover the cost of the bike. This check was cashed on XX/XX/XXXX ( copy attached ). 

Since XX/XX/XXXX, I have repeatedly checked my account to ensure the total amount was applied correctly, but it never showed a XXXX balance. Despite my numerous complaints starting in XXXX, no action was taken to resolve this issue. 

Actions Taken : In late XXXX, Citibank informed me that the check might have been lost and requested more evidence of the check. 
I contacted my insurance company and obtained a copy of the cashed check. 
On XX/XX/XXXX, I complied with Citibank 's request to send the copy via fax for security reasons and successfully sent it. 
Following this, I checked in weekly for a status update. Each time, my calls were forwarded, and I was told they could not find the fax. 
I continued to check as recently as XXXX  and XXXX  weeks ago, but encountered the same issues. 
Throughout this period, Citibank has contacted me monthly to correct the debt. I have repeatedly explained that I do not owe anything and that the issue is due to their failure to apply the insurance payment to my account. 
On XX/XX/XXXX, I called to request a formal complaint. I was put on hold for almost an hour, but my request was neither complied with nor given any resolution or time frame for resolving the issue. Additionally, they provided me with a " direct line '' that is not associated with the XXXX  credit card customer service. 
Current Status : As of today, XX/XX/XXXX, Citibank has failed to resolve the issue, provide any temporary solution, or comply with my request for a formal complaint. Despite my numerous attempts to rectify this situation, they have not properly applied the insurance payment to my account, causing undue stress and inconvenience. 

I am seeking the CFPB 's assistance to resolve this matter promptly and ensure that Citibank correctly applies the insurance payment, removes any associated debt from my account, and takes corrective action to prevent such occurrences in the future. 

Thank you for your attention to this matter. 

Sincerely, -XXXX
